subject: Workflow not triggering from Gmail
body:
Hi FlowForge Support,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out because I've been experiencing an issue with my Gmail-triggered workflow for the past two days. The workflow is supposed to fire when I receive an email with the subject line containing 'Invoice', but it doesn't seem to be running at all. I've checked that the workflow is set to Active, and I've confirmed my Gmail account is connected under Settings > Integrations.

Could you please help me understand what might be going wrong? I'm on the Growth plan and this workflow is critical for our invoice processing automation.

Thank you for your time,
Sarah Mitchell
Operations Manager, BrightPath Solutions
hey quick q — what's the diff between growth and business plan? is it worth upgrading?

subject: Request for EU data residency activation
body: We are a EU-based company (Italy) and need to ensure our workflow data is processed and stored in the EU for GDPR compliance. We are currently on the Business plan. Please activate EU data residency for our account or advise on the process. Our DPO will need written confirmation once done.

subject: Refund request — charged twice
body:
Hello,

I just noticed that my credit card was charged twice for my monthly subscription — once on Jan 1st and again on Jan 15th. Both charges are for $79. This does not seem correct. I have been a customer since March and never had this issue before.

I'd like the duplicate charge refunded immediately. Please investigate.

Jennifer
Hi! My workflow stopped working suddenly. It was fine yesterday. Now showing 'Authentication Failed' on HubSpot step. Help??

subject: Need to add 5 more team members
body: We currently have 18 members on our Business plan (cap is 20). We are onboarding a new team and need to add 5 more members, bringing our total to 23. Do we need to upgrade to Enterprise? We'd prefer not to if there's a add-on option. Also what's the Enterprise pricing?

subject: How do I connect Airtable?
body:
Hey,

I'm trying to connect Airtable to my workflow and I keep getting an error saying my API key is invalid. I generated the key from my Airtable account settings. What am I doing wrong?

Thanks
Alex
is flowforge down? nothing is triggering since like 30 mins ago

subject: Can I build a customer onboarding flow with FlowForge?
body:
Hi! We're evaluating FlowForge for our customer onboarding automation. Here's what we want to do:
1. New customer signs up → welcome email via Gmail
2. 3 days later → follow-up Slack message to our team
3. Day 7 → check if customer logged in (API call to our system) → if not, send nudge email

Is this possible? What plan would we need? Are there any limitations I should know about?

subject: RE: Refund request — charged twice [FOLLOW-UP]
body:
Hello again,

I sent a message three hours ago about a double charge and haven't heard back. This is unacceptable. I need this resolved TODAY. If this isn't fixed, I'm disputing both charges with my bank and cancelling my subscription.

Jennifer
hey i also sent an email earlier about my gmail workflow not working... just following up here in case. ticket ID was TKT-001 i think

subject: Request for SOC 2 report and security questionnaire
body:
Dear FlowForge Security Team,

We are conducting a vendor security assessment as part of our procurement process. Could you please provide:
1. Your most recent SOC 2 Type II report
2. A completed copy of our security questionnaire (attached as PDF)
3. Your data processing agreement (DPA) template

Our deadline for this is January 31st.

Best regards,
Takeshi Nakamura
IT Security Manager, DataSync Japan
oi, plano starter tem webhook? preciso receber dados do meu sistema

subject: Dedicated IP addresses for IP allowlisting
body:
Hi,

We've just completed our enterprise onboarding and need to whitelist FlowForge's outbound IPs in our firewall. Our security team requires a formal list of all static IPs that FlowForge uses for outbound webhook calls. Can you provide this, and also confirm if we can get a dedicated IP block as we discussed during sales?

Jordan Lee
CTO, Rocketship AI
how do i cancel my subscription? not using it anymore

subject: Workflow runs but Slack message not arriving
body: My workflow shows as 'Success' in the history but the Slack message never appears in the channel. I've checked the channel name and it's correct. This started happening after I changed the Slack workspace connection. What could be the issue?

subject: Need invoice with VAT number for accounting
body:
Hello,

We require all invoices to include our company VAT number for accounting purposes. Our VAT number is DE123456789. Could you please update our billing details and re-issue the last 3 invoices with this information? We also need invoices addressed to MediScan GmbH, not MediScan.net.

Thank you.
can i do loops in flowforge? like iterate over a list from an api response

subject: Workflow stuck in 'Running' state for 45 minutes
body: Workflow ID: WF-88821 has been showing status 'Running' for 45 minutes. This is a critical production workflow that processes order confirmations. It should complete in under 30 seconds. We cannot manually cancel it. Please investigate urgently.

subject: HIPAA compliance and PHI data handling
body:
Dear FlowForge Team,

We are a healthcare AI company exploring FlowForge for workflow automation. Before we can proceed, we need to understand your HIPAA compliance posture:

1. Are you willing to sign a Business Associate Agreement (BAA)?
2. Can you confirm that PHI passing through webhooks is encrypted and not stored beyond necessity?
3. Do you have a HIPAA-compliant infrastructure option?

This is a prerequisite for any commercial engagement.

Best,
Nirav Patel
CTO, Healthcare AI Inc.
what happens to my workflows when my trial ends? will I lose everything??

subject: Airtable API key stopped working after Airtable update
body: Since January 1st, my Airtable connection stopped working. I read somewhere that Airtable deprecated their legacy API keys. Do I need to create a new Personal Access Token? If so, how do I update this in FlowForge?
hey! love flowforge btw 💙 quick question — can I set up SSO with Azure AD? we're on business plan

subject: Request for Enterprise pricing and custom contract
body:
Hello,

We are a mid-sized company (~800 employees) currently evaluating automation platforms. We're interested in FlowForge Enterprise. Could you:
1. Share Enterprise pricing details
2. Discuss whether custom data processing agreements are available
3. Schedule a demo with your enterprise sales team

We have a decision to make by end of month.

Thank you
my workflow is sending duplicate emails 😤 its fired 3 times for the same trigger. how do i stop this

subject: Do you offer nonprofit discounts?
body: Hi, we're a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit and we're interested in using FlowForge for volunteer coordination automation. Do you have a nonprofit pricing program or discount? We have a very limited budget.

subject: Webhook payload size limit — need to send 8MB
body:
Hi,

We need to send image data through an incoming webhook and our payload is approximately 8MB. Your docs mention a 5MB limit. Is there any way to increase this limit for our Business plan account? Alternatively, is there a way to upload files directly and reference them in the workflow?

Thanks,
Dev Team @ Pivot
can i have more than 5 workflows on starter? like do they offer bundles or anything

subject: Export workflow history / audit logs
body: We need to export our workflow execution logs for a compliance audit. We are on Business plan. Can you confirm: (1) how far back logs go, (2) export format, and (3) whether we can automate this export on a schedule?

subject: My trial ended and everything is paused — I can't lose my workflows!
body:
Hi,

My trial just ended and all my workflows are now paused. I spent 2 weeks setting up 4 workflows and I can't afford to lose them. I don't have a budget right now for a paid plan. Is there any grace period? Or can I export them to save them?

I'm really stressed about this, please help!

Rachel
hola! can flowforge connect to mysql database directly? i want to insert rows when a form is submitted

subject: SSO not working after Azure AD group change
body: We updated our Azure AD group assignments yesterday and now 3 of our FlowForge users cannot log in via SSO. They receive a '403 Access Denied' error. Our Okta/Azure config has not changed — only the group membership. Please investigate urgently. These users are blocking a product launch.
quick one — does flowforge have a mobile app?

subject: Data Processing Agreement — legal review request
body:
Hello FlowForge Legal Team,

We are in the process of signing an enterprise agreement and our legal team requires a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) compliant with GDPR Article 28. Our legal counsel has several amendments to propose to your standard DPA. Could you please connect us with your legal/compliance team to proceed with negotiations?

Kind regards,
Legal Department
my colleague just deleted one of our workflows by mistake 😱 can it be recovered??

subject: How to schedule a workflow every weekday at 9am ET?
body: Hi! I want to run a workflow every weekday (Mon-Fri) at 9am Eastern Time. I see the scheduler has a cron option but I'm not familiar with cron syntax. Could you tell me the right cron expression to use? Also does FlowForge support timezone selection for scheduled triggers?
hey i asked about cancelling earlier — i changed my mind actually. can i stay on growth and get a discount instead? i feel like $79/mo is a bit steep

subject: RE: Gmail workflow issue — UPDATE
body:
Hi,

Just an update — I figured out the issue. The Gmail trigger filter was case-sensitive and the word 'Invoice' in my subject filter didn't match lowercase 'invoice' in incoming emails. I've added a note in case it helps other users.

The workflow is now running correctly. Thank you!

Sarah
good morning! how many integrations does starter plan get? all 300?

subject: Requesting partner / reseller program info
body:
Hello FlowForge team,

We are a digital agency managing automation for 40+ client businesses. We're very interested in a reseller or agency partner program. Do you have one? We'd want to manage multiple client accounts under one umbrella, with consolidated billing and white-label options if possible.

subject: Your product is BROKEN and your support is USELESS
body:
I have been trying to get a simple Shopify → Slack notification to work for THREE WEEKS. Every time I contact support I get a useless auto-reply. My workflows fail daily. I am paying $79/month for nothing. This is FRAUD. I want a full refund for the last 3 months and I want to cancel. I will be leaving reviews on every platform I can find.

DAVID
bro my tasks ran out and its only jan 17th 😭 i used 10k tasks in 17 days. what do i do

subject: FlowForge AI — does it learn from my workflows?
body: I enabled FlowForge AI beta last week and I'm curious about the privacy implications. Does the AI learn from my specific workflow configurations and data? I work with client information that is confidential and I need to ensure our data is not used to train AI models.
do you support on-premise deployment? our IT dept won't allow cloud-only tools

subject: Honest question — is FlowForge right for us?
body:
Hi FlowForge team,

I'm the CEO of a small 5-person startup. We're considering FlowForge for connecting our tools (HubSpot, Gmail, Notion). We don't have a tech background. Can you help me understand:

1. Can a non-technical person set this up?
2. What's the realistic time to first working automation?
3. What do most small teams use it for?
4. Should we start with Starter or Growth?

Being honest about our capabilities would be appreciated — not just a sales pitch!

James
est-ce que flowforge supporte les webhooks sortants avec auth bearer token? je veux appeler mon api

subject: Rate limit issue with Slack — 1 msg/sec not enough
body: I'm using FlowForge to send Slack notifications to a channel when orders come in. During peak hours we get ~10 orders per minute. With the 1 msg/sec Slack rate limit your docs mention, we're missing messages. Is there a way to queue and batch these, or handle bursts? Or do we need to move to Enterprise for higher throughput?
hey can i give my team member viewer access only? don't want them editing workflows

subject: Potential data exposure — urgent security incident
body:
We believe we may have inadvertently exposed sensitive customer data through a misconfigured FlowForge webhook that was sending data to an incorrect endpoint. We need to immediately:
1. Understand what data was transmitted and to where in the last 72 hours
2. Disable the workflow immediately (we cannot access the account — locked out)
3. Obtain logs for legal purposes

This is a security incident. Please treat this as Priority 1.

Security Team, FinTech Co.
is there a way to test a workflow without it actually running the real actions? like a sandbox mode?

subject: Annual renewal — want to discuss pricing before renewing
body: Our annual Business plan renews in 14 days. Before we renew, I'd like to discuss our options. We've grown from 8 to 16 users and are considering either renewing Business or upgrading to Enterprise. Could a sales rep contact me to discuss? We'd also be interested in understanding if there are any loyalty discounts for 3-year customers.
where do i find my API key for flowforge? I want to use the API to trigger workflows programmatically

subject: Feature request: Notion database trigger
body:
Hi FlowForge team,

We use Notion heavily for project management. We'd love to be able to trigger workflows when a property changes in a Notion database (e.g., Status changes to 'Done' → send Slack message). Currently the Notion integration only supports creating pages. Is a Notion trigger on the roadmap?

Thanks!
hi! we switched from zapier last month and love it so far. one thing — in zapier you could 'clone' a zap to another account. can i copy a workflow to a colleague's separate account?

subject: Code step (JavaScript) — access to npm modules?
body: We're using the Code Step feature (Enterprise) with JavaScript. Can we import npm modules within the code step? Specifically we'd like to use lodash and moment.js for data transformations. If not, what built-in utilities are available?
